name: io.github.full-vibe/calendarmcp
title: CalendarMCP
description: Hosted Google Calendar MCP server. Connect any AI agent to your Google Calendar in about two minutes. No self-hosting, no Docker, no credentials.json. Streamable HTTP transport works with Claude.ai, Cursor, Claude Code, OpenClaw, and any HTTP-capable MCP client. 10 tools including batch update, multi-account-one-key, and Google Advanced Protection support.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token. Get yours at https://calendarmcp.ai/dashboard
